---
title: "Longxiang Wu"
site: distill::distill_website
image: "longxiangwu.png"
links:
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub'
    url: "https://github.com/lunghsiang-wu"
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn'
    url: "www.linkedin.com/in/longxiang-wu-003506106"
  - label: '<i class="fab fa-mastodon"></i> Mastodon'
    url: "https://fosstodon.org/\\@longxiangwu"
  - label: '<i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Email'
    url: "longxiangwu@outlook.com"
base_url: https://longxiangwu.netlify.app
preview: longxiangwu.png
twitter:
  creator: "@Longxiang Wu"
  site: "@Longxiang Wu"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(metathis)
meta() %>%
  meta_description(
    "The personal website of Longxiang Wu"
  ) %>%
  #meta_name("github-repo" = "jhelvy/jhelvy.com") %>%
  meta_viewport() %>%
  meta_social(
    title = "https://longxiangwu.netlify.app",
    url = "https://longxiangwu.netlify.app",
    image = "https://github.com/lunghsiang-wu/longxiangwu_distill/blob/master/longxiangwu.png?raw=true",
    image_alt = "A photo of Longxiang Wu",
    og_type = "website",
    og_author = c("Longxiang Wu"),
    twitter_card_type = "summary",
    twitter_creator = "@Longxiang Wu"
  )
```
 
Hi! <span class="wave">👋</span> I am a data scientist who helps insurance companies do customers profiling. I love wrangling, modeling, and visualizing data, and helping others do the same.
